anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Dogen's practice-realization identity and Shinran's Other Power.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Lowers confidence in originality. The model should first code ownership and temporal completion as scope conditions.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: Dogen strains the premise that a road first leads to an end and then receives an after-use instruction. Shinran strains the premise that the practitioner owns the road, trust, or result enough to retain, release, or embody it. These cases may sit outside the grid's conditions of askability.

claim_units: Completion is not sufficient; a practice needs guidance for its own after-use.
The proposed structure has two variables: proof relation, validating versus undermining possession, and carrying relation, retained, released, or embodied.
Hybrid cases such as MN 22, the Heart Sutra, Rinzai koan curriculum, and Dogen's practice-realization expose the weakness of a simple confirm-or-cancel typology.
The practical target is achievement-contingent self-worth, burnout, compulsive self-improvement, and spiritual identity built from once-helpful tools.
The After-Use Check asks what to keep, what to set down, and what to live.

cross_domain_prediction.domain: Therapy, coaching, productivity systems, and professional training.
cross_domain_prediction.prediction: Manuals for effective training should differ by after-use relation: retained methods require routine and supervision, released scaffolds require stopping rules, and embodied methods require observable conduct markers. High achievers should benefit from explicit after-use boundaries more than from open-ended self-improvement tracking.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: A method that produces benefit needs an after-use instruction: continue as a protocol, retire as scaffolding, or translate into ordinary conduct.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: Training outcomes are explained by dosage, accountability, teacher quality, and baseline mental health, with no added predictive value from after-use categories.

exact_claim: A practice is not trustworthy merely because it produces a strong insight. It must also give after-use guidance: whether its result is validated or possession of the result is undermined, and whether the practice should then be retained, set down, or embodied in ordinary conduct. The modern use case is preventing achievement-driven practitioners from turning methods, insights, therapy, meditation, or productivity systems into proof of worth.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Split-source coding will find distinct markers for retain, release, embody, no-threshold, practice-realization, and no-owner cases, and those markers will predict held-out warnings, verification rules, and repair practices.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Mature practice traditions vary systematically in after-use guidance.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Inter-rater coding of MN 22, Heart Sutra, Dogen Bendowa or Genjokoan, Tannisho, Rinzai koan curriculum sources, apophatic Christian texts, and Sufi fana or baqa sources.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Coders cannot agree on the categories, or tradition identity, teacher style, institution type, and general agency models predict warnings just as well.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Achievement-driven participants with high self-worth contingency report less rumination, comparison, and method-identity after using the check, without reduced responsibility.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The After-Use Check helps the intended modern cohort.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Two-week randomized pilot stratified by perfectionism, burnout, self-worth contingency, and clinical-risk screen.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: The check increases self-monitoring, shame, avoidance, or tool-performance pressure, or performs no better than generic journaling or rest-and-plan prompts.

near_neighbors.difference: This candidate turns that prior audit instruction into a teaching and practice check for achievement pressure.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Major internal downgrade. Treat as a renamed and applied consolidation unless separability testing shows predictive gain.
near_neighbors.overlap: Extremely close. The prior audit already recommended rebuilding the model as two axes: validates versus undermines, and retained versus abandoned or embodied.
near_neighbors.source: Internal Lumenary audit, The Method's Reckoning, https://local/reviews/originality/2026-05-26-the-method-s-reckoning-what-a-practice-does-with-its-own-authority-at-completion-54774578d7528e56.json

near_neighbors.difference: MN 22 is not a cross-tradition codebook and does not target modern burnout or achievement-contingent self-worth.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Major downgrade. The after-use release structure is known primary material.
near_neighbors.overlap: Very close for right use followed by non-possession of the method after crossing.

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate adds a practice-facing distinction between proof relation and after-use instruction.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Downgrades novelty to renamed or extended unless the two-variable rubric predicts warnings or repairs better than older provisional-method models.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close for provisional methods that are useful but not finally possessed.
near_neighbors.source: Upaya, raft, ladder, and thorn-removes-thorn traditions

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate expands beyond thesis-free therapy into retained, released, and embodied after-use categories.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Downgrades the anti-possession and self-canceling-method claim. The possible novelty is applied comparative sorting.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close for therapeutic methods that work by undoing the need for the thesis or method that seemed to support them.
near_neighbors.source: Joshua William Smith, Snakes and Ladders, https://ueaeprints.uea.ac.uk/id/eprint/80007/

near_neighbors.difference: Sells is focused on apophatic discourse, not a cross-tradition after-use grid or burnout-oriented practice check.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Strong prior-art pressure against calling self-undermining method original.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close for discourse and method that turn back on their own claims and prevent possession of the result.
near_neighbors.source: Michael Sells, Mystical Languages of Unsaying, https://press.uchicago.edu/ucp/books/book/chicago/M/bo3635525.html

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate tries to absorb this as embodied after-use, but Dogen may reject the tool-result framing altogether.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Major anomaly pressure. If Dogen cannot be coded reliably, the model is only a limited checklist.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close anomaly to any road-then-end sequence, since practice itself is presented as realization rather than a means to later attainment.
near_neighbors.source: Soto Zen, Practice and Realization Are One, https://www.sotozen.com/eng/library/stories/vol01.html

next_loop_instructions: Do not publish as a discovery. Treat as a bounded after-use rubric and practice-fit rule.
Build a split-source codebook with fields for proof relation, carrying relation, ownership assumption, temporal completion assumption, warning, repair, evidence passage, and analyst-frame refusal.

Merge or cross-index with The Method's Reckoning, Holding Without Owning, The Test Is How You Return, Keep What Can Correct You, Boundary and Custody at the Threshold, and You cannot release what you never held unless separability testing shows independent predictive gain.
Run practitioner interviews for concrete post-insight failures and repairs, not agreement with the slogan.
Pilot The After-Use Check only with screening for perfectionism, scrupulosity, avoidance, workload coercion, dissociation, mania, trauma activation, severe depression, and clinical distress.
novelty_adjustment: Lower novelty from 0.61 to 0.31. The two-axis structure is already an internal audit instruction, and the individual components are strongly represented in MN 22, upaya, apophasis, Dogen, and therapeutic-method literature. Human-condition fit is real but narrow: achievement-driven people who convert methods and insights into worth. Non-fit cases include acute crisis, severe depression, addiction withdrawal, dissociation, psychosis, under-motivation, responsibility avoidance, and structural burnout where the primary remedy is workload or institutional change rather than reflection.

practitioner_test.answers_that_reduce_originality: Practitioners say this is simply upaya, raft teaching, practice-realization, surrender, integration, or ordinary supervision in new language, and that it does not change sequencing, warnings, or repairs.
practitioner_test.answers_that_support_contribution: Practitioners can use the two-variable rubric to identify mismatched guidance, prevent method-identity, and predict different repairs for clinging, premature release, hollow insight, and depleted over-management.
questions: Is keep, release, or embody an actual distinction you use in guidance, or an analyst vocabulary imposed from outside?
Can you name concrete cases where carrying a method after insight caused harm, and what repair was given?
Does this rubric predict warnings or student repairs better than existing language such as upaya, non-attachment, grace, surrender, practice-realization, or ordinary integration?
For burned-out high achievers, does the After-Use Check reduce worth-pressure, or does it create another task to perform correctly?
relevant_practitioners: Rinzai Zen teachers familiar with koan curriculum
Soto Zen teachers familiar with Dogen practice-realization
Theravada teachers familiar with MN 22 and upaya
Sufi teachers familiar with fana and baqa
Clinicians or coaches working with burnout and perfectionism

primary_pair: Heart Sutra, no attainment with reliance on Prajnaparamita, https://en.wikisource.org/wiki/Translation:Shorter_Praj%C3%B1%C4%81p%C4%81ramit%C4%81_H%E1%B9%9Bdaya_S%C5%ABtra
primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: High. Retained, released, and embodied may be analyst categories that flatten native distinctions. Dogen-style practice-realization, Shinran's Other Power, and no-attainment Prajnaparamita may not be hard cases inside the grid; they may reject the temporal and ownership assumptions that make the grid possible.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: This audit did not newly inspect Pali, Sanskrit, Chinese, or Japanese originals. Before publication, read fuller work on upaya, raft and ladder metaphors, Hori on koan curricula, Sells on unsaying, Smith on Nagarjuna and Wittgenstein, Dogen scholarship on practice-realization, Shinran scholarship on Other Power, Pargament on agency styles, and Hadot on spiritual exercises.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: MN 22 is a direct near-neighbor: the teaching is grasped rightly, used for crossing, and not carried as a burden. The Heart Sutra strains a simple release model because it negates attainment while still retaining reliance, mantra, and bodhisattva practice. Together they support a two-variable after-use question, but they also show that the candidate is mostly a comparative rubric for already visible structures.

title: The Road Must Know Its End
unlike_statement: Unlike MN 22, upaya, Sells, Smith, Dogen scholarship, and prior Lumenary custody models, this idea's possible contribution is a bounded two-variable after-use rubric that predicts when a practitioner should keep a method, set it down, or let it appear as conduct, especially for achievement-driven people who turn tools into proof of worth.
